changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO answer_weights (id, value, name, description) VALUES (7, 1, '', '') , (8, 3, '', '') , (9, 5, '', '') , (10, 7, '', '') , (11, 9, '', '') ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET value = excluded.value, name = excluded.name, description = excluded.description;
ALTER SEQUENCE answer_weights_id_seq RESTART WITH 12;
